channel.title: Temporal on Pi Stack
channel.description: Recent content in Temporal on Pi Stack

item.title: Self-Hosted Saga Orchestrators — Temporal vs Camunda vs Cadence 2026
item.description: The saga pattern solves the problem of distributed transactions in microservices — when a business process spans multiple services, each with its own database, traditional ACID transactions are impossible. Instead, sagas break the process into a sequence of local transactions, each with a corresponding compensation action that undoes it if a later step fails.
